title: Green Thumb Industries Inc (GTBIF) Q1 2024 Earnings Call Transcript Highlights
text: Green Thumb Industries' Q1 2024 earnings call highlighted robust growth and strategic expansion initiatives. The company reported Q1 2024 revenue of $276 million, up 11% year-over-year. Earnings per share of 13 cents significantly exceeded analyst estimates of 4 cents. Adjusted EBITDA surpassed $90 million with margins near 33% of revenue. Gross margin stood at $145 million or 52.5% of revenue, showing improvement from the prior year. Management discussed plans for continued store expansion and geographic diversification. The company's capital allocation strategy emphasizes investment in growth while returning cash to shareholders through repurchase programs. Cash flow from operations exceeded $80 million in the quarter, demonstrating strong business fundamentals. Management expressed confidence in the company's ability to navigate pricing pressures through brand differentiation and operational efficiency. The company is positioned strength across 14 states provides diversification benefits.
